summary: Create meta-context injector module for preload-skills that generates 200-token-capped markdown context blocks from meta-KB, wire into selectTools()
root_cause: Skill prompts lacked awareness of meta-KB anti-patterns, conventions, and recent learnings relevant to the task context
fix_approach: Create generateMetaContext() function that queries meta-KB index for relevant anti-patterns, path-matched entries, and conventions, formats top-3 as markdown block capped at 800 chars (~200 tokens), wire into selectTools() result

validation.notes: 9 tests: null inputs, no matches, anti-pattern match, path match, conventions, maxChars cap, MAX_ENTRIES limit. All pass.
